purpose: Execute the B45 lead ruling (Lead review 2026-07-17T09:08:00Z): rebuild B43's exact-Haar orthogonal directions on B42's residual-minimized forward structure, evaluate fresh on Mini and on the complete 1000-MLP Full split, and promote/submit on the Full paired evidence that the underpowered Mini gate false-negatives (B44's finding, independently re-verified this tick from raw per-MLP reports).

base_champion.verified: git diff 013df29 HEAD -- estimator.py empty at review start; whest validate passed

candidate.design: Directions generated exactly as B43's candidate (candidate_claude.py @ 56c3f41): 25 blocks of exact-Haar orthonormal directions via fnp.linalg.qr of seeded float32 Gaussian (256,256) matrices, sign-corrected by sign(diag(R)), plus 100 iid normalized rows = 6500 unit directions, same rng consumption order. Forward pass uses B42's structure: float32 weights, 650-row chunks, per-layer sums accumulated in float64, scaled once by the closed-form chi(256) mean radius (radial-exact).

pre_validation_probe.prediction_agreement: max |B45-B43| over all 32 layers on 3 real Mini MLPs: 5.0e-08 / 8.8e-08 / 6.6e-08 (float32 forward rounding, matching the B42 precedent)

mini_paired.verdict: CI straddles zero (50/100) exactly as the B44 fat-tail diagnosis predicts -- recorded per ruling condition 2; promotion gates on the Full paired evidence per the B45 lead ruling. Zero failure flags both sides.

full_gate.method: B26's validated chunked driver (whestbench.cli._run_estimator_with_runner over explicit index ranges, ground truth from dataset fields, seed_protocol_version read from the unsliced dataset -- the B26 weakref fix), ten sequential foreground 100-MLP subprocess chunks. MANDATORY correctness check re-run for this new estimator BEFORE any real chunk: chunked full[0:20] and mini[0:30] aggregate final_layer_mse matched the official CLI to the exact last printed digit (1.0013784913098788e-05 and 5.166219021172462e-06); effective compute differed only by wall-clock jitter.
full_gate.prediction_carryover_check: per-MLP final_layer_mse vs B44's B43 Full record: max rel diff 5.2e-04, mean 9.3e-05 (float32 forward rounding; same magnitude as B42's 5.0e-04 precedent)

baseline_exact.baseline: B26 complete Full report (submitted champion B25 predictions = current B42 champion predictions)
baseline_exact.result: PASS -- both CIs entirely below zero, broad not outlier-driven

baseline_simulated_b42_sensitivity.method: champion per-MLP effective_compute rescaled by the B42/B25 Mini ratio 0.95987, re-floored at 0.1, adjusted = mse * multiplier
baseline_simulated_b42_sensitivity.result: PASS -- gate robust to the champion-baseline multiplier assumption

authorized_by: Lead ruling 2026-07-17T09:08:00Z (experiments/log-claude-lead.md): promotion override on Full paired evidence for the Mini fat-tail false-negative case; all four ruling conditions satisfied (fresh Full record, Mini pair recorded, CAS promotion, step-7 submission protocol).
verdict: PROMOTE (per lead ruling; Full paired CIs entirely below zero at -5.6 sigma adjusted / -5.8 sigma MSE vs the submitted baseline, -4.65 sigma vs the conservative simulated-B42 baseline) and SUBMIT (Full gate complete, -20.7% vs last_submitted_score, zero failure flags).
